mapper.insert: insert into gateway_requests(request_id, app_id, provider_id, model_id, billing_rule_id, status, latency_ms, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens, cost_amount, error_code, request_time) values(#{requestId}, #{appId}, #{providerId}, #{modelId}, #{billingRuleId}, #{status}, #{latencyMs}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{costAmount}, #{errorCode}, #{requestTime})
